arabic_text: وَمَن يَبْتَغِ غَيْرَ ٱلْإِسْلَمِ دِينًۭا فَلَن يُقْبَلَ مِنْهُ وَهُوَ فِى ٱلْآخِرَةِ مِنَ ٱلْخَسِرِينَ
alt_text: Arabic Quran verse: 'And whoever desires a religion other than Islam — never will it be accepted from him, and he, in the Hereafter, will be among the losers.' Sura Al 'Imran 3:85, with the verse-number marker (٨٥).
notes: Inline Quran verse image. Surah 3, ayat 85.
